title: Intensely Malty Dutch Bean Sprouts Skillet
description: A crispy and romantic Dutch dish featuring bean sprouts, ferment-jang, and a malty flavor, all in a paleo-friendly package.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent and starting to brown.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the bean sprouts and cook until they are tender and lightly browned.
In a small bowl, whisk together the malt syrup and ferment-jang.
Pour the malt syrup mixture over the bean sprouts and stir to combine.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Continue to cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the sauce has thickened and the bean sprouts are coated.
